subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 739632045/240609556 is not a GRB
body:
C. Fletcher (USRA) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 739632045/240609556 at 13:20:40.23 UT
on 09 June 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particles."
